issues.description: Condition checks 'HasRestingDon' but should check total DON!! cards on field (resting + active). The text says '3 or more DON!! cards on your field', not specifically resting DON!!.
SearchDeck action missing the 'count' parameter. The effect says 'look at 7 cards from the top of your deck', so it should search/look at 7 cards, not search the entire deck.
SearchDeck filter should be 'ByType' with 'type: Stage' instead of 'ByName'. [Zou] refers to the Stage card type with that name/subtype, and the second action correctly uses subType filter.
SearchDeck is missing 'revealCount: 1' to encode 'reveal up to 1 [Zou]'
PlayFromHand is missing 'count: 1' to encode 'play up to 1'
